summary: Video export/download pipeline fixes verified. All 8 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests confirmed: (1) StoryPreview page renders full content with title, video player, scenes, download button for jobs WITH output_url, (2) Admin users do NOT see 'Remove Watermark (5 Credits)' button, (3) Download button shows 'Download started!' toast for admin, (4) Jobs WITHOUT output_url correctly show 'No downloadable assets yet.' message.
critical_code_review_comments: media_routes.py (lines 89-116): download-token endpoint correctly checks output_url, preview_url, and fallback_video_url with proper structured error responses (202 for processing, 404 with status 'not_ready', 410 for failed)
StoryPreview.js (line 16): Correctly imports ProtectedContentContainer instead of default ProtectedImage export
ProtectedContent.js (lines 33-42): Admin bypass correctly implemented - isAdmin check prevents watermark display for ADMIN/SUPERADMIN roles
EntitledDownloadButton.js (lines 55-66): Correctly handles 202 (processing) and 410 (failed) status codes with appropriate toast messages
entitlement.py (lines 26-38): Admin override returns can_download=true, watermark_required=false for ADMIN/SUPERADMIN roles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video export/download pipeline fixes verified. Key test jobs: (1) 99f9cd11-a1d8-4909-9ed7-04a0320a2820 (The Whispering Woods) - has output_url, download works, (2) 8d1c200d-6bd5-49ff-becf-3cdcc91528b9 (The Upside Down Room) - PARTIAL_READY, no output_url, shows 'No downloadable assets yet.' message. Admin bypass working - admin@creatorstudio.ai does NOT see 'Remove Watermark (5 Credits)' button. StoryPreview page correctly uses ProtectedContentContainer import.

backend_tests_summary.TestAdminEntitlement: 1 test passed - Admin has can_download=true, watermark_required=false
backend_tests_summary.TestDownloadTokenEndpoint: 4 tests passed - success with output_url, not_ready without output_url, 404 for nonexistent, requires auth
backend_tests_summary.TestStoryPreviewEndpoint: 1 test passed - returns title, scenes, final_video_url
backend_tests_summary.TestFreeUserDownloadRestriction: 1 test passed - free user download denied with 403

feature_implementation_verified.StoryPreview full content: Verified - title, video player, scenes, download button all render
